note: OrangeGlow + MistBridge are structurally near-identical (negative top-margin, vw blooms, mix-blend:screen, overflow:visible, aria-hidden). A single prop-driven SectionBridge (variant: warm|mist) is the obvious extraction, but both are hard-wired to the home seam. Neither is in any registry. preparer records only; extraction goes to component-forge.

existing_transitions_audit.OrangeGlow: page-local (home fire-seam; --fire/orange; vw-overflow; bespoke — do not generalize, not in library)
existing_transitions_audit.MistBridge: dead (muddy #2a2724 ramp + screen-blend; JSX commented on home; code kept). NOTE: blur/haze seam transitions DROPPED by user decision 2026-06-17 — no tr-mist-bridge/tr-blur-bridge in library.
existing_transitions_audit.band-alternation: keep (default for low-contrast light<->soft) + supplement high-contrast seams with tr-gradient-bridge / tr-glow-crossover / tr-masked-divider (raw black<->white hard-cut judged weak)
existing_transitions_audit.tone-flip: ADDED 2026-06-26 (manual). Distinct CLASS from tr-* seam bands: a scroll-driven PINNED flip of a SHARED through-background gradient (light->dark crossfade through brand bridge+glow) for a whole group, not a 2-section seam. Implemented + live (/dev/canvas-bg, /dev/scroll-transitions, page-local .evr-toneflip on evidence-based-reports) but NOT yet an extracted barrel component -> consumption_readiness=needs-extraction; route extraction to visual-layer-forge/component-forge before page-composer/build-pages can consume.

transitions.name: OrangeGlow
transitions.type: warm transition + soft gradient bridge + glow bloom

transitions.name: MistBridge
transitions.status: DEAD — imported but JSX commented out in page.tsx ('kept for upcoming iteration'); styles live, never rendered

transitions.name: Neutral Gradient Bridge
transitions.type: neutral cross-surface gradient bridge (in-flow band element)
transitions.implementation: <div class='tr-gradient-bridge' data-from data-to aria-hidden> placed between two sections; linear-gradient(in oklab to bottom, var(--from) 0%, var(--to) 100%); height clamp(48px,7vh,112px); data-from/to map to --bg/--bg-soft/--bg-ink
transitions.overlap_depth: none (in-flow, own height; neighbours need no negative margin)
transitions.mobile_fallback: height clamp collapses toward ~48-57px; no JS
transitions.reduced_motion: n/a (static); any future opt-in fade only via ScrollFX data-reveal
transitions.note: EXTENDED batch 2: per-direction multi-stop ramps for all 6 directions (light<->soft short/near-flat; soft->ink/light->ink/ink->light/ink->soft asymmetric, faint cool midpoint). Hex stops (raw oklab() stops break Next16 Lightning CSS — see memory). Distinct from SectionBridge(warm|mist) extraction.

transitions.name: Hard Surface Cut
transitions.type: intentional surface cut (zero-height modifier; 1px hairline on ink)
transitions.intent: default for low-contrast light<->soft seams; use sparingly on high-contrast

transitions.name: Pattern Dissolve
transitions.type: surface gradient + low-opacity pattern (dot/line) dissolving top/bottom
constraints: section-boundary dissolve only; NOT page-level continuation (blocked by surface ownership)

transitions.name: Masked Divider
transitions.type: soft-mask boundary (diagonal split or convex dome; lens-aperture grammar)
constraints: no edge glow/shadow (anti-template); one per page

transitions.name: Glow Crossover
transitions.type: section-modifier glow bleeding across seam (violet/lavender/cyan, contained)
constraints: violet/cyan only; NO orange; NO --lens fill; composited <=0.18

registration.note: registered as blocked; architectural value preserved

reasons: page owns cross-section overlap; Lab sections lack transparent/inherit surface

transitions.name: Lens Hairline Seam
transitions.type: in-flow 1px brand-gradient hairline between dark sections (lens grammar)
transitions.implementation: <div class='tr-lens-seam' aria-hidden> 1px tall, width:100%, background:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(108,76,241,.4), rgba(46,197,232,.4), transparent); pointer-events:none. Modifier --strong (.6 stops) for high-contrast dark seams.
constraints: dark surfaces only; violet+cyan only; one accent line, not a band

consumption_readiness.browser_qa: run (:3005; 1px lens gradient between ink sections; pointer-events:none; overflow 0)

transitions.name: Through-Background Tone Flip
transitions.source: web/src/app/dev/canvas-bg/CanvasToneFlip.tsx + canvas-tone-flip.css; through-bg layers .ds-canvas__bg--lobes / --lobes-dark in src/components/ds/ds.css; page-local variant .evr-toneflip on web/src/app/product/evidence-based-reports/page.tsx; ancestry /dev/scroll-transitions + /dev/parallax-spike
transitions.type: scroll-driven PINNED tone-flip of a SHARED through-background gradient: the light lobes crossfade to their dark counterpart through a brand BRIDGE (lavender->violet->deep-blue->near-black) + GLOW bloom (never grey), while a destination heading flies up, holds at centre, inverts dark->white, then redocks into the dark section. NOT a between-two-sections seam band — it recolours the through-background of a whole group.
transitions.static_or_motion: motion (GSAP ScrollTrigger; pin + scrub + directional snap; reduced-motion aware; client-side, scoped, auto-cleaned; ScrollFX-compatible)
transitions.implementation: Requires a group wrapper .ds-canvas carrying TWO stacked bg layers: .ds-canvas__bg--lobes (light base) + .ds-canvas__bg--lobes-dark (dark twin at opacity 0). A pinned <section class='cbg-tf'> seam sits between the transparent light group and the ink destination. On scrub, GSAP drives the global darkBg opacity 0->1 (the flip) plus cbg-tf-bg--mid (bridge) and cbg-tf-bg--glow (glow) blooms, and a .cbg-tf-flyer heading rides --tf-y and inverts --tf-ink/--tf-title; the destination Gallery head is hidden then revealed in place.
transitions.overlap_depth: group-scoped (recolours the through-bg behind a run of sections, not a 2-section seam); pinned, pinSpacing:false
transitions.clipping: through-bg layers absolute inside .ds-canvas; pinned seam owns its stage
transitions.z_index: bg layers behind content; bridge/glow z1-2 within seam; flyer above
transitions.mobile_fallback: separate desktop/mobile heading copies; pin/scrub still apply
transitions.reduced_motion: aware — sets darkBg opacity 1, docks the real heading, skips the timeline
constraints: needs a shared .ds-canvas dual-gradient through-bg scaffold + transparent group surfaces
brand bridge mandatory (never pass through dirty grey)
one major arc moment per page
transitions.reusable: page-local-pattern (NOT yet extracted to a @/components/ds barrel component)

reasons: lives as a dev composition (CanvasToneFlip) + a page-local .evr-toneflip, not one prop-driven component
requires the .ds-canvas dual-gradient through-bg scaffold + transparent group surfaces
unblock_requires: extract to a reusable component via visual-layer-forge/component-forge

transitions.note: CSS tonal bridge extracted to tr-tone-flip (ready) 2026-06-26; this `tone-flip` entry now denotes the GSAP flyer-heading choreography only, which stays page-local/needs-extraction (GSAP runtime + destination-section coupling are against library rails).

transitions.name: Pinned Tonal-Flip Zone
transitions.source: globals.css (visual-layer-forge targeted; de-scoped generalization of the production .evr-toneflip)
transitions.type: scroll-PINNED tonal crossfade zone: two stacked full-viewport tonal layers inside a sticky stage; the destination (ink) layer crossfades in via ScrollFX `--pin` as the [data-pin] zone scrolls, so one surface transforms into the next with no seam. Optional `--bloom` modifier adds a brand mid-frame (bridge + glow, opacity = CSS triangle peaking at --pin=0.5) so the flip never passes through dirty grey.
transitions.static_or_motion: motion (ScrollFX `--pin` ONLY — no GSAP, no JS, no new runtime)
transitions.implementation: . Zone height 150vh sets pin travel; `.__to{opacity:var(--pin)}`; bloom `opacity:calc(min(var(--pin),1-var(--pin))*2)`. data-from/to map light->--bg / soft->--bg-soft / ink->--bg-ink. Add `tr-tone-flip--bloom` for the brand mid-frame.
transitions.overlap_depth: none (in-flow zone; own 150vh height IS the pin travel)
transitions.clipping: stage overflow:hidden; sticky within the zone
transitions.z_index: auto (flow); decorative layers contained in the stage
transitions.mobile_fallback: <=760px collapses to a SHORT static gradient bridge (clamp(140px,40vh,320px)); stage static; all four layers display:none
transitions.reduced_motion: prefers-reduced-motion:reduce shares the same collapse -> static bridge (no pin, no crossfade)
constraints: tokens only (--bg/--bg-soft/--bg-ink/--ink/--violet/--cyan); NO --aqua/teal, NO --fire/orange, NO --lens fill
tuned for light/soft->ink (the from layer is a soft tonal wash)
one major tonal handoff per page

consumption_readiness.browser_qa: run (:3005 /dev/visual-lab; desktop 1280 pinned 150vh + tablet 768 pinned, both overflow 0; --pin scrub: __to opacity linear crossfade, bloom triangle peak 1.0 @ --pin 0.5; mobile 375 + reduced-motion collapse to static bridge with all layers display:none; no console errors; mid-frame screenshot not obtainable headless per scroll-clamp gotcha -> certified via eval/inspect)

transitions.produced_by: visual-layer-forge (targeted extraction of the tone-flip CSS bridge)
